series_title:
Correspondence – Administrative
Policy & Program Development
On formulation, planning, implementation,
interpretation, modification, or redefinition of the
programs, services, or projects of an agency and
the administrative regulations, policies, and
procedures that govern them.

Correspondence - General
Non-administrative incoming/outgoing and
internal correspondence, in any media, pertaining
to or arising from the routine operations of the
policies, programs, services, or projects of an
agency.

Bylaws and Procedures Governing the
Commission

Calendars, Appointment and Itinerary
Records of Officials and Employees

Received

Documentation for Requests Not Exempted
from Release

series_title:
Detail Chart of Accounts for Each Fiscal
Year

Contracts and Leases
Contracts, leases, and agreements include general
obligation, land lease, utilities, and construction
except for buildings. Documents include
specifications, affidavits of publication of calls for
bids, accepted bids, performance bonds,
contracts, purchase orders, inspection reports,
and correspondence.
